name: AdminHelper
description: Adds direct staff moderation commands for ban, hackban, unban, kick, softban, timeout, untimeout, warn, warning lookup, warning clearing, user info, moderation cases, and mod stats, with optional DM notices and mod-log embeds.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: AdminHelper loaded. Use `[p]adminhelper` to inspect settings. Moderation commands include `[p]ban`, `[p]kick`, `[p]timeout`, and `[p]softban`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild-level moderation settings and case records containing action types, target IDs/names, moderator IDs/names, reasons, timestamps, durations, and details. It also stores per-member warning records containing moderator IDs, reasons, timestamps, and case IDs, per-user previous username/global display name history observed while the cog is loaded, and per-member previous server nickname history observed while the cog is loaded.
